title: Poor Charlie's Almanack: The Essential Wit and Wisdom of Charles T. Munger (Companion Edition)
author: Charles T. Munger
description: A companion and reader's guide to Poor Charlie's Almanack, edited by Peter D. Kaufman. Focuses on Kaufman's editorial framework, chapter-by-chapter navigation, and how the companion volume supplements the main Almanack with structured context, checklists, and reading roadmaps.
